scripts.test:staging: npm run clean:allure && cross-env ENVIRONMENT=staging playwright test
scripts.test:preprod: npm run clean:allure && cross-env ENVIRONMENT=preprod playwright test
scripts.test:prod: npm run clean:allure && cross-env ENVIRONMENT=prod playwright test
scripts.test:staging:smoke: npm run clean:allure && cross-env ENVIRONMENT=staging playwright test --grep @smoke
scripts.test:staging:regression: npm run clean:allure && cross-env ENVIRONMENT=staging playwright test --grep @regression
scripts.test:preprod:smoke: npm run clean:allure && cross-env ENVIRONMENT=preprod playwright test --grep @smoke
scripts.test:preprod:regression: npm run clean:allure && cross-env ENVIRONMENT=preprod playwright test --grep @regression
scripts.test:prod:smoke: npm run clean:allure && cross-env ENVIRONMENT=prod playwright test --grep @smoke
scripts.test:prod:regression: npm run clean:allure && cross-env ENVIRONMENT=prod playwright test --grep @regression
scripts.test:staging:ui: npm run clean:allure && cross-env ENVIRONMENT=staging playwright test --ui
scripts.test:preprod:ui: npm run clean:allure && cross-env ENVIRONMENT=preprod playwright test --ui
scripts.test:prod:ui: npm run clean:allure && cross-env ENVIRONMENT=prod playwright test --ui
scripts.report:allure: npm run report:allure:generate && npm run report:allure:open
